Title: Goldscheider, Ludwig
Overview: Educated by the second "Vienna School" of art historians, Julius Alwin von Schlosser was possibibly his diss advisor. 1938 emmigrated to London, 1938-73 co-founder, director, designer and editor of the Phaidon Press, London. His papers are housed at the Getty Center, Malibu, CA.
Sources: Wendland, Ulrike. Biographisches Handbuch deutschsprachiger Kunsthistoriker im Exil: Leben und Werk der unter dem Nationalsozialismus verfolgten und vertriebenen Wissenschaftler. Munich: Saur, 1999, vol. 1, pp. 208-10.
